name: App.tsx
description: Main entry point file for the React Native application defining global styles and root layout.

name: App
description: Root component function that renders the main application structure including routes and status bar.

name: constants.ts
description: Defines mock authentication credentials for development and testing.

name: routes.tsx
description: File containing navigation configuration for the React Native application

name: Routes
description: Component that defines the navigation stack with Home, Post, and Login screens

name: types.ts
description: Defines TypeScript types for the application.

name: utils.ts
description: Utility function to create a Promise that resolves after a specified time delay.

name: Float.tsx
description: A TypeScript file defining the Float React component.

name: Float
description: A React component that renders two absolute positioned views with rounded bottom corners.

name: LoginHint.tsx
description: A TypeScript React component file that displays login hints for username and password fields on a login screen

name: LoginHint
description: A React component that displays hidden login hints (username/password) to users on a login screen with a toggle button

name: Toast.tsx
description: This file defines the Toast component used for displaying notifications within the React Native application.

name: Toast
description: This component renders a toast notification message using the react-native-toast-message library.

name: usePosts.ts
description: Custom hook file that manages posts data fetching with pagination and loading states in a React Native application

name: usePosts
description: Custom React hook that fetches posts data with pagination, loading, and refresh functionality

name: useToast.ts
description: A TypeScript file defining a custom hook for displaying toast notifications in React Native applications.

name: useToast
description: A custom hook that allows showing toast messages with customizable types, titles, and descriptions, including an error variant.

name: Home.tsx
description: A React Native screen component that displays a flatlist of posts with refresh and logout functionality

name: HeaderRightButton
description: A component that provides refresh and logout icons with click handlers in the header

name: HomeScreen
description: A screen component that fetches and displays posts in a FlatList with loading and navigation states

name: Login.tsx
description: React Native TypeScript file containing user authentication login screen with username/password input and credential validation

name: LoginScreen
description: React component handling user login functionality with input fields, credential validation, and navigation to Home screen

name: Post.tsx
description: A React Native screen component for displaying post content.

name: Post
description: A component that renders a post's title and body from navigation parameters.
